title: strophanthus preussii
intro: Strophanthus preussii, also known as the preuss's strophanthus, is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including cardiotonic and anti-inflammatory activities, which are attributed to its presence of cardenolides and bufadienolides. The health benefits of Strophanthus preussii include its potential use in treating heart failure, hypertension, and certain types of edema, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tincture, infusion, or ointment, and is used in herbal medicine to treat a range of cardiovascular conditions.
